Off Calendar Aug-17-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Trevor Koski, of the Office of the City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3800, for defendants;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO Motion To Compel Plaintiff Response To Defendant Request For Production Of Documents Set One
is granted. Plaintiff shall, within 10 court days, serve, without objection, code complaint responses to the Request for Production of Documents, Set One. Order signed in open court, but counsel left without it being processed. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
